hook.text: REAL MADRID ENTER THE FERNANDES RACE

beats.text: MOURINHO'S MADRID ARE ALSO IN THE RACE
WEST HAM VALUE FERNANDES AT A HEFTY £80M
UNITED STAY CONFIDENT OF SEALING THE DEAL

caption: The Fernandes saga has a new twist 🔴 After days of talks over West Ham's asking price, Real Madrid have now entered the race for Mateus Fernandes — with Jose Mourinho's side reportedly showing strong interest in the 21-year-old West Ham midfielder. PSG are also watching. United won't match West Ham's £80m valuation but remain confident they will seal the deal — and Fernandes himself remains desperate to move to Old Trafford. Will Madrid hijack this one? 👇 REPORTED — per Sky Sports / Mundo Deportivo. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow
